Interface Version

public interface Version
Verson is an interface that represents the history of a class over its lifetime, while it can be serialized and deserialized. Each version contains a Modification array that represents what needs to happen to take an older copy of an Object and update it to the latest version of that class.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getCurrentVersion()
    Returns a String representing the most recent version of the class.
    Modification[]
    getModifications(String originalVersion)
    Returns a Modification array that represents what needs to happen to take Object from originalVersion to the result of getCurrentVersion().
    static RuntimeException
    versionError(String version)
    A utility method that returns a RuntimeException generated in a format consistent with other errors thrown by this library.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentVersion

      String getCurrentVersion()
      Returns a String representing the most recent version of the class.
      Returns:
      a String representing the most recent version of the class

    • getModifications

      Modification[] getModifications(String originalVersion)
      Returns a Modification array that represents what needs to happen to take Object from originalVersion to the result of getCurrentVersion(). The array is ordered in such a way that, when starting from index 0, each Modification can be successfully applied.
      Parameters:
      originalVersion - a String representing the version of the class that the Object was serialized under
      Returns:
      a Modification list that represents what needs to happen to take Object from originalVersion to the result of #getCurrentVersion()

    • versionError

      static RuntimeException versionError(String version)
      A utility method that returns a RuntimeException generated in a format consistent with other errors thrown by this library. The error is intended to be used when a Verision lacks the neccessary Modifications to deserialize an Object of a given version.
      Parameters:
      version - a String representing the version that of the class that the Object was attempting to be deserialzied was serialized under
      Returns:
      a RuntimeException for an unsupported version formatted consistently with other errors thrown by this library
